docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY HETZEL, BENJAMIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-31-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-31-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,306.00 FILED BY HETZEL, BENJAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT LAY, CAMBER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-31-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED JUN-15-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LAY, CAMBER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HETZEL, BENJAMIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAY, CAMBER $952.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,057.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2015 - JUDGMENT.
